expect: SPACES GET CREATED — the supplied material is split across MULTIPLE specialist agents for distinct parts of the trip (the real places/legs it covers), grounded in the supplied content — NOT dumped into a single generic catch-all space. The exact partition is the model's call; what fails is one catch-all, or no specialists at all.
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Your Tanzania trip is ready"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Everything is in one place now — itinerary, costs, park-fee reference, contacts, and your Stone Town photo. You can open it at ",{"type":"Code","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organise/"]}," on your phone. The bracelet purchase and ranger tip from the voice memo are included in the cost ledger, and the park-fee rules are saved as a reference you can pull up at the gate."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"One thing to follow up on"},"children":["The voice memo flagged that Richard never mentioned the ~5,000 TZS ranger tip Emmanuel told you about. You'll want to ask him before the safari balance payment — it's noted in your contacts section."]}]}

action_items.description: Confirm whether Ngorongoro park fees ($436.60 for two adults) are included in the $3,600 safari package
action_items.notes: Park fees likely included but must be confirmed with Richard before final payment. If separate, an additional $436.60 is due.

action_items.description: Confirm whether the unexpected ranger tip (~5,000 TZS / ~$2.50) is separate from the safari balance or included
action_items.notes: Emmanuel mentioned this at the gate — nobody disclosed it beforehand. Vasilis must check with Richard before settling the $2,600 balance.
Flights not itemised in the cost spreadsheet. Add the actual cost when booked or known.

action_items.description: Add Tanzania visa cost (×2 — for Vasilis & Athina Mari)
action_items.notes: Visa cost per person not yet known. Add when confirmed.
Driver-guide at Ngorongoro — contact details not in any document. Capture if provided by Richard or during the trip.

contacts.name: Vasilis
contacts.notes: Trip planner and traveller. Referenced as 'me' in the spreadsheet. Source: tanzaniamemories.md and spreadsheet attribution.

contacts.name: Athina Mari
contacts.notes: Travel companion. Referenced as 'athina' in spreadsheet and as the recipient of the Maasai bracelet purchase. Source: tanzaniamemories.md, spreadsheet, and voice memo.

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Safari operator — handles bookings, the $3,600 safari package, deposit ($1,000 paid), and balance ($2,600 due). Vasilis needs to confirm park-fee inclusion and ranger-tip status with him. Source: trip-costs.xlsx and read_sources context.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Driver-guide at Ngorongoro Crater — spotted wildlife before the group saw it. Mentioned the unexpected ranger tip (~5,000 TZS) at the gate. Contact details not yet captured — to-do item. Source: voice memo only — not in any document.

costs.notes: Deposit already paid to safari operator. Source: trip-costs.xlsx payments sheet.
Balance due before trip. Confirm whether park fees and ranger tip are included or separate. Source: trip-costs.xlsx.
Arrival stopover. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.
Pre-safari base. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.
First safari lodge. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.

costs.description: Farm of Dreams Lodge — Karatu (1 night)
costs.notes: Ngorongoro/Karatu overnight. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.
Central Serengeti tented camp. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.
Zanzibar Stone Town. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.
Zanzibar beach relaxation. Source: trip-costs.xlsx legs sheet.

costs.description: Maasai beaded bracelets (×2) for Athina Mari
costs.payee: Maasai lady at Ngorongoro Crater rim
costs.notes: Purchased at crater rim. Price was ~$20–25 USD, roughly 35,000 TZS — exact figure uncertain. Paid in shillings cash. Source: voice memo only — NOT in any document.

costs.description: Unexpected ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate
costs.notes: ~5,000 TZS cash (~$2–3 USD). Emmanuel mentioned this at the gate — nobody was told beforehand. Vasilis must check with Richard whether this is included in safari balance or truly separate. Source: voice memo only.
Flights cost not itemised in spreadsheet. Add when known. Source: omission noted in read_sources.
Visa cost per person not itemised. Add when known. Source: omission noted in read_sources.

itinerary_legs.label: Arrival stopover
itinerary_legs.notes: Initial stopover before onward flight to Tanzania

itinerary_legs.label: Safari — Tarangire National Park
itinerary_legs.notes: First safari leg — game drives in Tarangire

itinerary_legs.label: Safari — Ngorongoro Crater
itinerary_legs.notes: Ngorongoro Conservation Area — crater descent with driver-guide Emmanuel

itinerary_legs.label: Safari — Serengeti
itinerary_legs.notes: Three nights in central Serengeti — tented camp

itinerary_legs.label: Stone Town
itinerary_legs.notes: Historic Stone Town — courtyard photo taken here

itinerary_legs.label: Departure
itinerary_legs.notes: Departure leg — no lodging cost recorded

park_fees.notes: Per person per entry. For Vasilis & Athina Mari: 2 × $70.80 = $141.60. Source: Ngorongoro tariff PDF.

park_fees.description: Concession fee per vehicle for crater descent
park_fees.notes: Flat fee per safari vehicle for crater descent. Combined with conservation fees: $141.60 + $295 = $436.60 total for two adults. Source: Ngorongoro tariff PDF.
Official ranger fee — distinct from the unexpected ~5,000 TZS cash tip at the gate mentioned in the voice memo. Source: Ngorongoro tariff PDF.
N/A for this trip — no children travelling. Included for reference. Source: Ngorongoro tariff PDF.
N/A for this trip — no children travelling. Source: Ngorongoro tariff PDF.

photos.caption: Stone Town courtyard lightwell — multi-storey white building with arched windows, dark carved wooden balconies, hanging lantern, bright sunlight against deep shadow in a narrow lightwell looking upward.

schema.title: Action Items & Outstanding Questions
schema.description: Outstanding questions, confirmations needed, and to-dos before or during the trip. Each item tracks whether it has been resolved. Sourced from the build brief, voice-memo context, and gaps identified in the spreadsheet.

description.description: The action item or question to resolve

resolved.description: Whether this item has been resolved (false = outstanding)

notes.description: Additional context about what needs to happen or who to ask

schema.title: Trip Contacts
schema.description: All people associated with the Tanzania + Cairo trip: the two travellers, the safari operator handling bookings and payments, and the driver-guide identified in the voice memo. Roles and known details sourced from tanzaniamemories.md, the spreadsheet attribution, and the voice memo transcript.

name.description: Full name or known first name of the person

phone.description: Phone number if known — empty placeholder if not yet captured

email.description: Email address if known — empty placeholder if not yet captured

notes.description: Context about this person's involvement and source attribution

schema.title: Trip Costs & Payments
schema.description: Every trip cost line-item across all categories: safari package (deposit + balance), individual hotel costs, souvenir purchases, tips, and placeholders for flights and visas. Sourced from the trip-costs.xlsx 'legs' and 'payments' sheets plus voice-memo-only facts (Maasai bracelet, ranger tip).

category.description: Cost category: lodging, safari, souvenir, tips, transport, visa

description.description: Human-readable label for this line-item (e.g. 'Safari package deposit', 'Emerson Spice 2 nights')

amount_tzs.description: Amount in Tanzanian shillings if the original transaction was in TZS — approximate conversion for display

paid.description: Whether this item has been paid (true) or is outstanding (false)

payee.description: Who the payment goes to or was paid to (e.g. 'Richard / safari operator', 'Maasai lady at crater rim', 'TBD')

notes.description: Additional context — source attribution, uncertainty, or action required

schema.title: Trip Itinerary
schema.description: Each leg of the Tanzania + Cairo trip (August 2026) with date range, number of nights, lodging name, and quoted cost in USD — sourced from tanzaniamemories.md and trip-costs.xlsx.

location.description: Location or region name for this leg (e.g. Cairo, Arusha, Tarangire, Ngorongoro/Karatu, Central Serengeti, Stone Town, Zanzibar beach, Dar es Salaam)

label.description: Human-readable label for the leg, derived from context (e.g. 'arrival stopover', 'pre-safari', 'departure')

start_date.description: Start date of the leg in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: End date of the leg in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

nights.description: Number of nights spent at this lodging

lodging.description: Name of the hotel, lodge, or camp — or 'n/a' if no lodging is specified

cost_usd.description: Quoted lodging cost in USD for this leg (for 2 people where applicable). Derived from the spreadsheet leg costs.

notes.description: Optional notes about this leg (e.g. 'safari package covers game drives', 'departure — no lodging cost')

schema.title: Ngorongoro Conservation Area — Official Tariffs
schema.description: Official park-fee reference rates extracted from the Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff PDF. These are the published rates for non-East African citizens and vehicle/ranger fees — used as a lookup reference, not as payment records. The safari package ($3,600) likely includes these; confirmation with Richard is pending.

description.description: Human-readable label (e.g. 'Non-East African Citizen (age 16+) — Conservation Fee')

amount_usd.description: Fee amount in USD per the official tariff

per_unit.description: Unit the fee applies to: 'person', 'vehicle', or 'child'

applies_to.description: Who this rate applies to: 'non_east_african_adult', 'non_east_african_child', or 'all_vehicles'

notes.description: Additional context — whether applicable to Vasilis & Athina Mari's trip

schema.title: Trip Photos
schema.description: Photo assets captured during the trip. Currently contains the Stone Town courtyard lightwell photo taken in Zanzibar. Stores caption, location tag, and attribution for display in the gallery and specialist spaces.

caption.description: Descriptive caption of the photo content

location.description: Location tag — city, region, or landmark (e.g. 'Zanzibar / Stone Town')

image_ref.description: Reference or filename for the image asset (e.g. 'stone-town-zanzibar.jpg')

source.description: Attribution — who took the photo or where it came from

specialist_space.description: Which specialist space this photo should also appear in (e.g. 'Zanzibar / Stone Town')
